NSIWC Meeting With SEC

L-R,  Chairman, National Salaries, Incomes and Wages Commission Barr Ekpo Nta  with Director General  Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Lamido Yuguda during a Meeting between NSIWC and The SEC in Abuja.
